name: drift
description: Crawl two websites and detect regressions — built for build-tool migrations and refactors

scripts.build:linux-x64: bun run prebuild && bun build --compile --minify --bytecode --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/drift-linux-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun run prebuild && bun build --compile --minify --bytecode --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/drift-linux-arm64
scripts.build:win: bun run prebuild && bun build --compile --minify --bytecode --target=bun-windows-x64 src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/drift-windows-x64.exe
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64
